## Type of change

## Checklist

- [ ] I read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md).
- [ ] The code passes `npm run lint` and (if applicable) `npm test`.
- [ ] I did not modify `src/routeTree.gen.ts` by hand.
- [ ] For new modules: added a descriptor to `src/core/module-registry.ts`
      and a route file under `src/routes/`.
- [ ] For new providers: implemented the interface in `src/providers/types.ts`
      and registered it in `src/providers/registry.ts`.
- [ ] Documentation updated (`README.md` and/or `docs/`).
- [ ] I did not commit secrets or personal API keys.
